title: Artisan Keycaps, Custom Keysets & Desk Gear • Handmade
announcement: Welcome to KeebCraftCo! Every artisan keycap is hand-sculpted and resin-cast in my Portland, OR studio. I also make custom keycap sets, hand-stitched deskmats, and paracord-sleeved cables. Drops are limited—follow the shop to catch restocks. Please allow 1-3 weeks for made-to-order keysets and cables. Group buys and custom colorways available—just message me!
vacation_message: Jake game night Thursday — Overwatch or Rocket League?
sale_message: Thank you for your order! I’ll begin casting and finishing your keycaps within 3-5 business days. Each cap is hand-poured, so subtle swirl and color variations make every piece one of a kind. Don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions about MX compatibility or profiles!
digital_sale_message: Yuki care package arrived — text her thanks tonight.
policy_payment: I accept payments through Etsy's secure checkout system including credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. For custom keyset commissions over $150, a 50% deposit is required.
policy_shipping: All items ship via USPS from Portland, OR. Made-to-order keysets and cables ship within 10-21 business days depending on the colorway. Ready-to-ship artisans and deskmats go out within 3-5 business days. Sets ship in foam-lined boxes with tracking.
policy_refunds: I want you to love your keycaps! If an item arrives damaged, please contact me within 48 hours with photos and I'll send a replacement or full refund. Due to the handmade nature of resin casting, I cannot accept returns for minor swirl or color variations between caps.
